subtasks.description: Generate a multi-tool orchestration plan to retrieve Jira project requirements, check calendar API for team availability, schedule a standup meeting, and post agenda to Slack. Plan should specify tool sequence, data mapping between tools, and required API credentials/parameters.

plan.cost_rationale: This query explicitly requests multi-tool orchestration across four distinct systems (Jira, Calendar API, Meeting Scheduler, Slack). A single multitool_plan subtask (mid tier) is appropriate because: (1) the user is asking for a PLAN, not execution of individual queries—one multitool_plan call will generate the complete orchestration strategy; (2) mid tier is sufficient since this involves standard tool registry lookups and sequencing logic (no complex cross-source reconciliation or downstream inference); (3) no sql_gen, mongo_query, or cross_recon subtasks are needed—the multitool_plan agent handles tool coordination and data mapping between systems directly. The plan will output the sequence of tool calls, required parameters, and data flow needed for the collaboration workflow.
